commands.review_summary:
The PR hoists selected GitHub Actions expressions into environment variables, validates Docker label names, URL-encodes thread-ownership forwarder path segments, genericizes Gateway plaintext/TLS errors, and adds changelog entries.

Reproducibility: yes. for source inspection: current main shows direct workflow interpolation, Docker Go-template construction from a raw label, raw thread-ownership path segments, and the Gateway TLS wording contract. I did not establish a live exploit path in this read-only review, so runtime reproduction remains medium-confidence.
commands.review_followup: External security PR needs maintainer security/workflow review and stronger contributor-supplied real behavior proof; automation cannot supply that runtime proof for the contributor.
